messages.content: Name the largest ocean on Earth. Do not use a tool.

response.body_raw: {"id":"chatcmpl-576","object":"chat.completion","created":1784558080,"model":"mistral:7b","system_fingerprint":"fp_ollama","choices":[{"index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":" The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
